name: execution-truth-layer
description: Verify agent workflow outcomes against external SQL ground truth

scripts.test:node:sqlite: node --test --test-force-exit test/reconciler.sqlite.test.mjs test/pipeline.sqlite.test.mjs test/withWorkflowVerification.test.mjs test/workflowTruthReport.test.mjs test/cli.test.mjs test/stable-failure-consistency.test.mjs test/workflow-result-consumer-contract.test.mjs test/docs-contract.test.mjs
scripts.test:postgres: node scripts/pg-ci-init.mjs && node --test --test-force-exit test/postgres-session-readonly.test.mjs test/postgres-privilege.test.mjs test/pipeline.postgres.test.mjs test/ci-workflow-truth-postgres-contract.test.mjs
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:vitest && npm run test:node:sqlite && node scripts/first-run.mjs
scripts.test:ci: npm run build && npm run test:vitest && npm run test:node:sqlite && npm run test:postgres && node scripts/first-run.mjs
